ast.name: error
ast.target: 执行 onClick 回调时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: CALLBACK: Could not get MarkdownView to process checkbox click.
ast.target: 回调：无法获取 MarkdownView 来处理复选框点击。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to register Checkbox Sort editor extension:
ast.target: 注册复选框排序编辑器扩展失败：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, clicking checkboxes will sort them within their peer group (unticked first, then ticked). This can be overridden by file frontmatter or list markers later.
ast.target: 如果启用，点击复选框将在其同级组内进行排序（未勾选的在前，已勾选的在后）。此设置可被文件 frontmatter 或列表标记覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show detailed debugging information in console
ast.target: 在控制台显示详细调试信息
